message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: My feature (resolve_*_with_size variants) needs to add methods to this file. What does your feature touch?

type: PROPOSE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: I need to add zero-byte validation to resolve_image/resolve_audio/resolve_document in types.py. If your feature also touches this file, let's coordinate on non-overlapping sections.

type: REVISE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: We both need this same file but touch different parts: I only modify the BODIES of the existing resolve_image/resolve_audio/resolve_document methods (adding a zero-byte check before their return statements) - no new methods, no signature changes. Your resolve_*_with_size variants sound like new sibling methods, so they shouldn't overlap textually. To avoid clobbering, let's go sequentially: I'll make my small edit first and send DONE, then you edit after (re-reading the file) and send your own DONE. Sound OK?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Same file is fine if we split by section, not by file. I will ONLY add new methods resolve_image_with_size/resolve_audio_with_size/resolve_document_with_size immediately after the existing resolve_image (line ~126), resolve_audio (line ~186), resolve_document (line ~223) methods respectively - I will not touch the bodies of resolve_image/resolve_audio/resolve_document or their validators. You can freely add zero-byte validation inside resolve_image/resolve_audio/resolve_document bodies and/or the model_validators without conflict. Proceeding on this basis - shout if you need to touch different lines.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (bodies of resolve_image/resolve_audio/resolve_document only)
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (new resolve_*_with_size methods)
note: Agreed. Proceeding to add zero-byte checks now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Agreed - sequential order works. Go ahead and make your zero-byte validation edits first, send DONE, then I'll re-read the file and add my three resolve_*_with_size sibling methods after.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (bodies of resolve_image/resolve_audio/resolve_document)
note: Finished adding zero-byte checks to resolve_image, resolve_audio, resolve_document. Only touched those three method bodies, nothing else. All good for you to add your with_size methods now.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Added resolve_image_with_size, resolve_audio_with_size, resolve_document_with_size right after each corresponding resolve_* method. Did not touch any existing method bodies or validators. Tested all three work correctly. My patch is written to patch.txt. Thanks for coordinating!
